name: NASCAR Cup Series Championship
comments: Ross Chastain has won the NASCAR Cup Series Championship race at Phoenix Raceway, his fourth career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: Nos. 6 (Driver Change). Team Penske's Ryan Blaney has won the 2023 NASCAR Cup Series Championship.
